name: drone-telemetry
description: Real-time MAVLink telemetry cockpit for the Vyuta drone IDE.

vyuta.telemetry.gatewayUrl.description: WebSocket URL of the maestros telemetry gateway sidecar.

vyuta.telemetry.batteryWarnPercent.description: Battery charge (%) below which a warning alarm is raised.

vyuta.telemetry.batteryCriticalPercent.description: Battery charge (%) below which a critical alarm is raised.

vyuta.telemetry.audibleAlarms.description: Play a tone when a critical alarm (low battery / link loss) is active.

scripts.vendor: mkdir -p media/vendor/leaflet && cp node_modules/leaflet/dist/leaflet.js node_modules/leaflet/dist/leaflet.css media/vendor/leaflet/
